raw_intent: Build out STRIKE-POINT. Create a goal, mandate, roadmap, and task list. Execute. STRIKE-POINT repo includes FirstStrike and links with NCL. Make it real — the full pipeline from iPhone to brain cortex.

context.current_state: Repos created and pushed. FirstStrike iOS app builds and deploys to iPhone. Relay server runs on port 8787 with TLS. Tailscale bridge scripts exist but iPhone doesn't have Tailscale installed yet. Relay receives pump prompts but doesn't yet write to NCL/mandate-generation/input/.
blockers: Relay doesn't write to NCL file system
context.priority: P1 — this is the sole entry point to the entire NARTIX ecosystem
